limitations: Heuristic evidence weighting remains provisional in the legacy pipeline module.
Legacy pipeline routing is still intentionally minimal.

completion_integrity.guard.description: Completion Integrity Guard for artifact reopening, placeholder detection, and claim-evidence checks
limitations: Remote commit verification remains outside the local BasinLab session store.

tests.unit.description: Local unit-test evidence claim recognized by Completion Integrity
limitations: Maps evidence heuristically from artifact paths rather than structured test manifests.
No deploy authority or remote deployment integration is active in this tranche.
No production runtime is contacted or claimed by BasinLab acceptance.

basinlab.kernel.persistence.description: Persistent subprocess execution backend with namespace retention
limitations: Process isolation is best effort and not a hardened security boundary.

basinlab.execution.timeout.description: Bounded execution timeout and checkpoint-preserving recovery
limitations: Timeout enforcement depends on subprocess request timeouts rather than instruction-level preemption.

basinlab.namespace.inspection.description: Namespace summary, diff, and serialization-aware inspection
limitations: Large or non-serializable values are summarized instead of fully checkpointed.

basinlab.checkpoint.restore.description: Checkpoint snapshotting and restore into a fresh subprocess
limitations: Checkpoint authority remains subordinate to event replay and hash verification.

basinlab.session.persistence.description: SQLite-backed persisted session metadata, events, snapshots, artifacts, and replay hashes
limitations: Single-host local SQLite backend only; no distributed coordination or encryption layer.

basinlab.commit.proposal.description: Governed commit proposal path through Basin state, GUARD, and Completion Integrity
limitations: Produces governed decisions only; it does not perform git commits by itself.

basinlab.replay.description: Replay of governed BasinLab sessions from persisted events
limitations: Non-action sessions replay final governed reports rather than executable namespace state.

basinlab.candidate.spectrum.description: Deterministic candidate spectrum generation across strategies and providers
limitations: Current providers are deterministic local fixtures only.

basinlab.candidate.deduplication.description: Answer deduplication without collapsing distinct approaches
limitations: Deduplication remains text- and approach-driven rather than embedding-based.

basinlab.claim.reliability.description: Claim-level reliability engine for critical evidence and contradictions
limitations: Evidence inputs are deterministic fixtures rather than live retrieval outputs.

basinlab.rejection.contradicted_majority.description: Contradicted majority answers lose to verified minority answers
limitations: Operates only on provided claims; no automatic contradiction discovery yet.

basinlab.hold.unresolved_critical.description: Critical unresolved claims force HOLD rather than pressure-driven EXTEND
limitations: Criticality is currently scenario-declared, not inferred.

basinlab.scars.description: Contradiction-scar recording with prior epistemic state retention
limitations: Scars are local data structures; no cross-session merge policy yet.

basinlab.recovery.routes.description: Evidence-gated recovery routes that preserve failed-history auditability
limitations: Recovery remains deterministic and local rather than human-workflow integrated.

basinlab.associations.description: Association retrieval and weighted updates without treating context as truth
limitations: Association graph remains in-memory and deterministic.

basinlab.compression.verified.description: Verified compression preserving decisive replay references and final epistemic state
limitations: Compression criteria are caller-supplied and deterministic.

basinlab.natural_math.workload.description: Natural Math persistent-growth workload using separate local process states
limitations: Local process states remain separate from Cognitive Basin action enums by convention and code location.

basinlab.cli.description: CLI for run, run-all, inspect, replay, diff, providers, and capabilities
limitations: Local filesystem session store only; no remote connector integration.

basinlab.acceptance.description: Acceptance runner covering all deterministic BasinLab demonstrations
limitations: Deterministic local demonstrations only; no live model or deploy authority.

basinlab.reports.trajectory_html.description: Static local HTML trajectory reports with companion JSON and hostile-content escaping
limitations: Reports are static local artifacts and do not embed interactive remote assets.

basinlab.provider.vibethinker.description: VibeThinker adapter surface as an optional provider record only
limitations: No downloaded weights, no live inference, no execution authority, and no commit authority.

basinlab.stabilization.description: False-attractor-aware stabilization assessment with contradiction preservation
limitations: Current tranche provides deterministic primitives, not a full pipeline integration yet.

basinlab.hold.fog.description: Explicit HOLD fog tracking with entry reasons, required evidence, and release conditions
limitations: Current release tracks HOLD fog records but does not yet auto-attach them to every BasinLab session.

basinlab.memory.fractal_map.description: Auditable FractalMemoryMap with pruning events and replayable node history
limitations: In-memory local structure only; no persisted cross-session index yet.

basinlab.team_narrative.description: Auditable continuity records for contributors, decisions, conflicts, and recovery history
limitations: Current tranche stores continuity records locally and does not yet merge them with persisted session replay.

ephux_local.service.loopback.description: Loopback-only local HTTP service exposing BasinLab-backed EphUX endpoints and local UI
limitations: Restricted to local loopback use and development-only security controls; no production deployment posture.

ephux_local.guardian.intake.description: Guardian Intake endpoint with bounded uploads, duplicate detection, redaction, and hold/reject routing
limitations: Sanitization and conflict checks are deterministic local heuristics rather than a full remote moderation stack.

ephux_local.activation.description: Local activation flow that anchors purpose, routes provider preference, and emits governed next-step state
limitations: Unavailable providers are reported as limitations; only scripted local execution is guaranteed in this tranche.

ephux_local.extension.dev.description: Development browser-extension scaffold for local Guardian Intake selection handoff and activation
limitations: Development scaffold only; not packaged for store distribution and not intended for production browsing contexts.

ephux_local.acceptance.description: End-to-end local acceptance runner for intake, activation, replay, reporting, and provider limitation behavior
limitations: Exercises the local service path only; it does not verify remote deployment, cloud auth, or external browser-store packaging.

ephux_local.review.controls.description: Human review event controls for evidence decisions, commit decisions, notes, and HOLD provenance
limitations: Human approval is recorded as provenance only; it does not assert claim truth or perform a git commit.

ephux_local.portable_bundle.description: Portable session export and import with bundle hash validation and overwrite protection
limitations: Import restores embedded text artifacts and report artifacts only; opaque binary artifacts remain metadata-only.

ephux_local.pwa.shell.description: Installable local-only PWA shell with responsive layout, offline shell caching, and non-persisted local token entry
limitations: Offline support is shell-only and intentionally does not cache authenticated API results or fabricate completion state.

provider.router.description: Governed provider router that separates role selection, budget policy, privacy, and allowance posture from provider text-generation ability
limitations: Routing remains heuristic and local; live remote calls stay disabled by default and are not required for deterministic CI.
provider.router.provider_dependency: deterministic-fixtures by default; optional compatible endpoints when preconfigured

provider.ledger.description: Auditable provider invocation ledger with request/response hashes, token usage, cost fields, privacy classification, and disposition tracking
limitations: Unavailable cost signals remain null/unknown and raw credential-bearing values are intentionally excluded from the ledger.

provider.inventory.description: Secret-safe provider and local-model inventory for configured endpoints, allowance posture, reachability, and local hardware/model caches
limitations: Reachability checks are bounded and non-invasive; inventory does not prove billing state, production authority, or live model quality.
provider.inventory.provider_dependency: optional compatible endpoints and local model servers

provider.vibethinker.adapter.description: Optional VibeThinker adapter surface supporting bounded problem packets and explicit no-authority constraints across local or compatible backends
limitations: The adapter records bounded packets and hard authority denials, but this tranche does not claim live VibeThinker inference.
provider.vibethinker.adapter.provider_dependency: Transformers or OpenAI-compatible local backends when separately configured

basinlab.runner.subprocess.description: Common runner abstraction with subprocess receipts recording restriction classifications, process identity, timeout posture, and output hashes
limitations: Current receipts classify controls honestly, but the subprocess runner is still local-process isolation rather than a hardened security boundary.

sandbox_lab.adversarial.description: Adversarial sandbox suite covering forbidden imports, shell/process/network attempts, path traversal, dynamic execution, malformed protocol messages, output flooding, and timeout behavior
limitations: Most denials occur at AST preflight time; this proves governed rejection and honest classification, not production-grade isolation.

evaluation_lab.registry.description: Typed evaluation-task registry spanning arithmetic, code, safety, replay, and Natural Math comparison workloads
limitations: Task families are deterministic fixtures and do not yet represent live external benchmark corpora.
evaluation_lab.registry.provider_dependency: deterministic BasinLab scenarios and scripted providers

evaluation_lab.interface_comparison.description: Deterministic A/B/C/D/E interface comparison across single-pass, structured tool, persistent BasinLab, and provider-assisted routes
limitations: Comparison outputs are scripted and deterministic rather than measured against live remote models.
evaluation_lab.interface_comparison.provider_dependency: scripted provider fixtures plus BasinLab scenarios

evaluation_lab.failure_corpus.description: Failure-corpus regression checks for unsupported completion claims, provider-authority confusion, and guard bypass attempts
limitations: The corpus is intentionally synthetic and focuses on governed denial paths rather than broad external data coverage.

natural_math_lab.simulation.description: Deterministic Natural Math simulation, parameter sweep, replay evidence, and provenance capture using separate local process states
limitations: Simulation is a local deterministic laboratory workload and does not claim empirical validation beyond its encoded rules.

natural_math_lab.exact_geometry.description: Exact rational quadrance and spread utilities for reviewer-safe Natural Math geometry checks
limitations: Current geometry helpers cover deterministic exact calculations only; they are not a full theorem-proving environment.

natural_math_lab.visualization.description: Static SVG and JSON artifact generation for Natural Math run inspection without mutating the repository by default
limitations: Artifacts are static local files and do not provide an interactive analysis surface.

cognitive_basin.acceptance.aggregate.description: Aggregate deterministic acceptance manifest spanning BasinLab, EphUX local, provider, sandbox, evaluation, and Natural Math suites
limitations: Aggregate acceptance proves deterministic local behavior only and does not assert deploy or production authority.
cognitive_basin.acceptance.aggregate.provider_dependency: scripted and deterministic local dependencies only
